references.hebrew: ׆ וַיְהִ֛י בִּנְסֹ֥עַ הָאָרֹ֖ן וַיֹּ֣אמֶר מֹשֶׁ֑ה קוּמָ֣ה ׀ יְהֹוָ֗ה וְיָפֻ֙צוּ֙ אֹֽיְבֶ֔יךָ וְיָנֻ֥סוּ מְשַׂנְאֶ֖יךָ מִפָּנֶֽיךָ׃ וּבְנֻחֹ֖ה יֹאמַ֑ר שׁוּבָ֣ה יְהֹוָ֔ה רִֽבְב֖וֹת אַלְפֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ ׆ {פ}
references.english:
When the Ark was to set out, Moses would say:
Advance, O ETERNAL One!
May Your enemies be scattered,
And may Your foes flee before You! And when it halted, he would say:
Return, O ETERNAL One,
You who arehYou who are In contrast to others “To.” Israel’s myriads of thousands!

references.hebrew: וַיִּקְרָא־ל֣וֹ לָבָ֔ן יְגַ֖ר שָׂהֲדוּתָ֑א וְיַֽעֲקֹ֔ב קָ֥רָא ל֖וֹ גַּלְעֵֽד׃
references.english: Laban named it Yegar-sahadutha,nYegar-sahadutha Aramaic for “the mound (or: stone-heap) of witness.” but Jacob named it Gal-ed.oGal-ed Heb. for “the mound (or: stone-heap) of witness,” reflecting the name Gilead, v. 23.

references.hebrew: ׆ וַיְהִ֛י בִּנְסֹ֥עַ הָאָרֹ֖ן וַיֹּ֣אמֶר מֹשֶׁ֑ה קוּמָ֣ה ׀ יְהֹוָ֗ה וְיָפֻ֙צוּ֙ אֹֽיְבֶ֔יךָ וְיָנֻ֥סוּ מְשַׂנְאֶ֖יךָ מִפָּנֶֽיךָ׃
references.english:
When the Ark was to set out, Moses would say:
Advance, O ETERNAL One!
May Your enemies be scattered,
And may Your foes flee before You!
